arts.ttl: ‘You don’t need VAR for that’ - Flick says Barça were denied ‘clear penalty’ against Getafe
arts.sum: Barcelona’s perfect start to 2025 ended at the weekend thanks to a 1-1 draw away to Getafe that ended with huge controversy thanks to a penalty on Jules Kounde that wasn’t given by the referee or the pitch or by VAR despite plenty of evidence that the Blaugrana should have been given a late spot kick. One of the very few leagues around the world where the refereeing is actually really good is the Bundesliga, so it’s only natural that Flick can’t quite believe just bad the state of officiating is in Spain.
